assertions.description: GET / returns 200 with app name and version
GET /healthz returns 200 with status healthy
POST /api/auth/signup creates user and returns token
POST /api/auth/login with valid creds returns JWT
GET /api/items without auth returns 401
POST /api/items with auth creates item
GET /api/items returns list of user items
PATCH /api/items/{id} updates item data
DELETE /api/items/{id} removes item
Frontend root page loads without JS errors
Frontend auth page has signup and login forms
Frontend dashboard shows items list
All pages mobile responsive at 375px viewport
Supabase RLS policies exist for all tables
.env file not committed to git
All mutating routes require authentication
Backend dockerfile builds without errors
Frontend Next.js build completes without errors
GitHub Actions CI workflow exists
vercel.json exists in frontend directory
Backend pytest suite has at least 5 tests
LemonSqueezy checkout link is present on pricing page
